t: [...] God of Gods forever. He will shine His light upon you, and make His great name known to you.

And you will know that He is the eternal God, the master of all deeds, sovereign over all to do His will among them. He will bring you joy and happiness, and to your sons, in generations of truth forever.

And now, my sons, be careful with the inheritance given to you in peace, which your fathers have bestowed upon you. Do not give your inheritance to strangers, nor your possessions to foreigners, so you do not become lowly and despised in their eyes. They will mock you for having returned it to them, and they will be your rulers and have dominion over you.
Therefore, hold fast to the words of Jacob your father. Be strong in the judgments of Abraham, and in the righteousness of Levi and your own, for they are holy and pure above all others.

Be united in truth and walk in uprightness, not with a double heart, but with a sincere heart and a true and good spirit. And give me among yourselves a good name and joy to Levi, joy to Jacob, delight to Isaac, and praise to Abraham. Keep and walk in the inheritance which your fathers gave you: truth, righteousness, uprightness, perfection, holiness, and priesthood, as you were commanded and entrusted.
